description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job. Run four jobs in parallel: macos_bigsur on macOS 11, ros_foxy on ubuntu-latest with a ubuntu:focal container, ubuntu_focal on ubuntu-latest with a ubuntu:focal container, and ubuntu_focal_apt on ubuntu-latest with a ubuntu:focal container. For each job, check out the repository and run custom setup and build_test scripts.
